headline: A Look At NextEra Energy (NEE) Valuation As New Data Center Power Buildout Plan Emerges
summary: Why NextEra Energy’s new data center strategy matters NextEra Energy (NEE) has attracted fresh attention after outlining plans to install 15 to 30 gigawatts of new U.S. generation capacity by 2035, mainly gas based, to serve power hungry data centers and AI workloads. See our latest analysis for NextEra Energy. NEE’s recent data center capacity plans and the planned departure of its chief risk officer come after a 15.2% 90 day share price return and a 34.8% one year total shareholder return,...

headline: Cuba partially restores power as President Díaz-Canel vows ‘unyielding resistance’ to U.S. oil blockade
